title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus, a major GPU cluster, revealing that Anthropic lacks vertical integration for chips and infrastructure unlike other frontier labs. The analysis argues the AI race is shifting toward control of chips, energy, and datacenters rather than benchmarks alone.
